text:
Once upon a time in a little town named Springfield, lived Mr. Twiddle and Miss Jiggle. They spent their days rolling their joints and laughing until their sides ached. One sunny Saturday morning, Mr. Twiddle decided to embark on an adventure. "Let's go see who's at Muddlefoot Pond, where the pebbles sparkle under the sun like tiny diamonds," he whispered to Miss Jiggle with a twinkle in his eye.

As they meandered through the winding streets, they were greeted by the sight of Tom Fool, always lost in thought, and Clara Claptrap, her robotic appendages whirring rhythmically to some unheard symphony. "Ahoy, friends! Fancy a game of truth or dare?" Tom announced, slightly disoriented.

The duo happily accepted. And what a tale it was told between laughter and playful challenges! They played truth or dare, with Mr. Twiddle inevitably answering "truth" whenever the challenge posed seemed
